heading: Establishment
label: 285 Establishment
text: There is established in the House of Representatives an office to be known as the Office of the Law Revision Counsel, referred to hereinafter in this chapter as the “Office”.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 205(a) of House Resolution No. 988, Ninety-third Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Oct. 8, 1974Pub. L. 93–554

Effective Date, ch. III, , , provided that the enactment of House Resolution No. 988, Ninety-third Congress, , into permanent law is effective on .
